title: CircleCI の 400 エラー：原因と解決策
reasons: The article accurately describes common causes and solutions for CircleCI 400 errors, which are generally well-supported by official CircleCI documentation.
The troubleshooting steps and reference to API documentation are current and relevant.
The examples provided for config file errors and API request issues are consistent with CircleCI's expected behavior.
absolute wording may overstate technical certainty

sources.title: Configuration reference - CircleCI Docs
sources.claim: CircleCI config.yml version 2.1 supports Orbs and pipeline parameters, and 'version' is a required field.

sources.title: Error Codes - Circle Docs
sources.claim: CircleCI API 400 errors can be due to missing parameters or incorrect parameter types.

sources.title: API v2 introduction - CircleCI Docs
sources.claim: The CircleCI API v2 documentation is the official reference for API specifications.

sources.title: How to validate your CircleCI configuration
sources.claim: The `circleci config validate` command is used to check for syntax errors and YAML linting issues in the CircleCI configuration file.

sources.title: Pipeline Values and Parameters - CircleCI Docs
sources.claim: Pipeline parameters declared in config.yml (e.g., boolean, integer) require strict type matching when passed via API or Web UI.

sources.title: Feedback wanted: moving from v1.1 job triggering to v2 pipeline triggering - API
sources.claim: CircleCI config.yml version 2.1+ allows Orb references and pipeline parameter definitions.

sources.title: Trigger a new pipeline - CircleCI API v2 Reference
sources.claim: The `POST /project/{project-slug}/pipeline` endpoint is used for triggering new pipelines via the CircleCI API.

sources.title: API and Entity Errors - Circle Docs
sources.claim: CircleCI API error responses include a 'message' field with details about the problem.

sources.title: 400クラス・エラーのトラブルシューティング | IBM Cloud Docs
sources.claim: A 400 Bad Request error indicates that the client sent an incorrect request to the server, possibly due to invalid syntax or parameters.

sources.title: 400（Bad Request）エラーの原因と対処法を解説！ | SEMLabo. - オロ
sources.claim: A 400 Bad Request error is an HTTP status code indicating that the client's request has an error in its format or content, preventing the server from processing it correctly.

sources.title: Troubleshoot - CircleCI Docs
sources.claim: Errors often occur due to formatting issues in the .circleci/config.yml file, which can stop jobs from running.

sources.title: Troubleshooting why API Pipeline Parameters Do Not Work - CircleCI Support
sources.claim: When triggering a new pipeline, ensuring the 'Content-Type: application/json' header is passed is important for API parameters to apply correctly.

sources.title: Orb Quick Start Guide - CircleCI Docs
sources.claim: CircleCI config version 2.1 is required to use orbs.

unsupported_claims: CircleCI API error responses include an 'errors' array with problem details (while a 'message' field is supported, the explicit 'errors' array for all 400 responses is not universally documented in the provided sources).

Using single quotes in the API request body JSON will cause a 400 error (this is a general JSON syntax rule but not explicitly mentioned as a specific CircleCI 400 cause in the provided documentation).
The `circleci config validate` command has a `--strict` flag (this flag is not present in the official CLI documentation).
improvement_suggestions: Optional improvement: add official or primary source URLs for unsupported or weakly sourced claims.
Optional improvement: Provide an official source for the exact JSON `errors` array structure in CircleCI's 400 API responses, or rephrase to reflect that the `message` field is commonly used.

Optional improvement: Verify the existence and functionality of the `circleci config validate --strict` flag in official CircleCI CLI documentation. If it does not exist, correct or remove the recommendation.

Optional improvement: Either provide a CircleCI-specific source for single quotes in JSON request bodies causing 400 errors, or generalize this point as a common JSON parsing issue, or remove it as a specific cause if no direct CircleCI context supports it.
Optional improvement: Add links to official documentation or primary sources for key claims.
Optional improvement: Review current official docs and update changed API/spec/pricing details.
Optional improvement: Soften absolute claims unless they are directly sourced.
Optional improvement: Add official or primary source URLs for unsupported claims.
